items.Title: Free Fire Event Survey
items.Details:
Dear Survivors,

In order for us to understand you better, and to help improve the game for you, please take a few minutes of your time to fill in this survey.

Thank you for your cooperation!

items.Title: Gold Vault Update
items.Details:
Dear Survivors,

Gold Royale and Luck Royale will be removed from Free Fire on 24 June 2026.

After the update, Gold Royale Vouchers and Luck Royale Vouchers will no longer be available and can be exchanged for the new Gold Vault Voucher at the following rates:

1 Gold Vault Voucher = 1 Luck Royale Voucher
1 Gold Vault Voucher = 1 Gold Royale Voucher

Players may choose to either:
• Use up their current Gold Royale and Luck Royale Vouchers before the update, or
• Keep them and have them exchanged for Gold Vault Vouchers after the update.
Please take note of the upcoming changes and plan your vouchers accordingly.

Thank you for your continued support!

- Free Fire Operations Team

items.Title: VOUCHER REPLACEMENT
items.Details:
Dear Survivors,  

Gold Royale and Luck Royale have been removed in OB54. 
Gold Royale Vouchers and Luck Royale Vouchers in your inventory will be replaced with Gold Vault Vouchers at the following rates:  

1 Gold Vault Voucher = 1 Luck Royale Voucher 
1 Gold Vault Voucher = 1 Gold Royale Voucher  

You can use the Gold Vault Vouchers now in the new Gold Vault.  

Thank you for your patience and continued support!  

- Free Fire Operations Team

items.Title: Youtube Feature Update
items.Details:
Dear Survivors, 

We'd like to inform you that YouTube has been temporarily removed from the Social Media Info component in the Personal Profile due to technical issues. Once resolved, we will bring it back. 

Stay tuned for more updates, and thank you for your patience and understanding!
